## New Entry Submission

### Entry Details

- **Name:** [Resource name]
- **URL:** [Link to resource]
- **Section:** [Which section does this belong to?]

### Entry Content

```markdown
- [Name](url) - Description. **When to use:** Scenario.
```

### Checklist

- [ ] Entry follows the required format: `[Name](url) - Description. **When to use:** ...`
- [ ] Link is valid and points to an active project
- [ ] "When to use" annotation is specific and actionable
- [ ] Entry is placed in the correct section in alphabetical order
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] This is not a duplicate of an existing entry

### Why This Resource?

<!-- Brief explanation of why this resource deserves to be on the list -->
